Actions.description: All actions associated with the packet.
Actions.title: Actions

ApiKeyResponse.title: ApiKeyResponse

BatchCreateError.description: Error entry for a single packet in a batch create response.

BatchPacketCreate.description:
Request body for batch packet creation.

Accepts raw dicts so individual packet validation failures
can be reported as partial errors instead of failing the
entire request with a 422.
BatchPacketCreate.title: BatchPacketCreate

ChainRequest.title: ChainRequest

ClaimRequest.description: Request body for claiming a packet.
ClaimRequest.title: ClaimRequest

ContextEntry.description: A single conversation turn in the packet context.
ContextEntry.title: ContextEntry

Decision.description: A decision made during the session.
Decision.title: Decision

Dependency.description: An external dependency the receiving agent should know about.
Dependency.title: Dependency

HandoffPacketUpdate.title: HandoffPacketUpdate

HitlRespondRequest.description: Request body for responding to a HITL checkpoint.
HitlRespondRequest.title: HitlRespondRequest

Metadata.description: Packet metadata — source/target agents, timestamps, priority.
Metadata.title: Metadata

PacketContext.title: PacketContext

info.description: Session-continuity middleware for multi-agent AI workflows
info.title: HandoffRail

get.description: List tenant-scoped packet lifecycle events as a structured audit log.

parameters.description: Only entries at or after this timestamp
parameters.name: created_after

schema.description: Only entries at or after this timestamp
schema.title: Created After

parameters.description: Only entries at or before this timestamp
parameters.name: created_before

schema.description: Only entries at or before this timestamp
schema.title: Created Before

get.description: List all webhooks for the authenticated tenant.

schema.title: Response List Webhooks Api V1 Hooks Get

post.description:
Register a new webhook URL for packet status change notifications.

The webhook will receive POST requests with HMAC-SHA256 signed payloads
when the subscribed events occur.

get.description: List dead letter queue entries for the authenticated tenant.

schema.title: Response List Dlq Api V1 Hooks Dlq Get

post.description: Retry all failed deliveries that are due for retry.

schema.title: Response Retry All Dlq Api V1 Hooks Dlq Retry All Post

post.description: Replay a single dead letter delivery attempt.

schema.title: Response Replay Dlq Api V1 Hooks Dlq  Delivery Id  Replay Post

delete.description:
Deactivate (soft-delete) a webhook. The webhook is marked as inactive.

Inactive webhooks will not receive notifications but are retained for
audit purposes.

get.description: List delivery history for one webhook in the authenticated tenant.

schema.title: Response List Webhook Deliveries Api V1 Hooks  Webhook Id  Deliveries Get

get.description: List all API keys for the current tenant. The actual key values are not shown.

schema.title: Response List Api Keys Api V1 Keys Get

post.description: Create a new API key. Requires an existing valid API key.

delete.description: Revoke (soft-delete) an API key. The key is marked as revoked, not removed.

post.description:
Rotate an API key — creates a new key and revokes the old one.

The new key inherits the same name (with ' (rotated)' suffix), tenant_id,
and tier as the original. The old key is immediately revoked.

Returns the new key with the plain key value (shown only once).

get.description:
List packets with filtering and pagination.

Supports filtering by status, source_agent, target_agent, tags,
priority, and date range. Returns paginated results with total count.
Results are scoped to the authenticated tenant.

parameters.description: ISO 8601 — packets created after this time
parameters.name: created_after

schema.description: ISO 8601 — packets created after this time
schema.title: Created After

parameters.description: ISO 8601 — packets created before this time
parameters.name: created_before

schema.description: ISO 8601 — packets created before this time
schema.title: Created Before

parameters.description: Opaque cursor from next_cursor for large-result pagination
parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Opaque cursor from next_cursor for large-result pagination
schema.title: Cursor

post.description: Create a new handoff packet with full v1 schema validation.

get.description: Convenience endpoint: returns all packets in 'awaiting_human' status.

post.description:
Create multiple handoff packets in a single request.

Each packet is created in its own transaction — partial success is allowed.
Max batch size is controlled by the BATCH_MAX_SIZE setting (default 50).

Claim multiple packets in a single request.

Each packet is claimed atomically — a packet already claimed by another
agent returns an error for that entry but doesn't fail the whole batch.

Complete multiple packets in a single request.

Each packet is completed individually — a packet not found or in the wrong
status returns an error for that entry but doesn't fail the whole batch.

get.description:
Full-text search across packet summaries and context.

Uses SQLite FTS5 (dev) or PostgreSQL tsvector (prod) for relevance-ranked search.

delete.description:
Soft-delete a packet by marking it as expired.

The packet is not removed from the database — its status is set to 'expired'.

get.description: Get a single handoff packet by ID.

patch.description: Partially update a packet. Status transitions are validated against the state machine.

post.description:
Create a new packet that continues from the current one.

Automatically sets parent_packet_id to the current packet's ID
and links context from the parent.

Claim a packet for processing.

Only packets in 'created' or 'awaiting_human' status can be claimed.
Conflict detection ensures only one agent can claim a packet.

409.description: Packet already claimed or not claimable

get.description:
Return all status transitions and events for a packet.

Returns timestamps and actor information for each event.

post.description:
Submit a human response to a HITL checkpoint.

Only works on packets in 'awaiting_human' status.
After response, the packet transitions to 'claimed' or 'in_progress'.

get.description:
Get aggregate statistics for the dashboard.

Returns packet counts by status, recent activity, HITL queue depth,
and active WebSocket connections.

schema.title: Response Get Stats Api V1 Stats Get

get.description: Liveness probe — returns ok if the process is running.
Readiness probe — checks if the database connection is working.
